zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Gaynsford於1457年出生在英國素瑞可洛爾斯特時，她的父親Nicholas Gaynsford34歲，母親Margaret Sidney36歲。她和Robert White至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於大約1497年在她的家鄉享年41歲，埋葬在英國素瑞可洛爾斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Gaynsford于1457年出生在英国素瑞可洛爾斯特时，她的父亲Nicholas Gaynsford34岁，母亲Margaret Sidney36岁。她和Robert White至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于大约1497年在她的家乡享年41岁，埋葬在英国素瑞可洛爾斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Gaynsford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Gaynsford was born in 1457, in Crowhurst, Surrey, England, her father, Nicholas Gaynsford, was 34 and her mother, Margaret Sidney, was 36. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Robert White. She died about 1497, in her hometown, at the age of 41, and was buried in Crowhurst, Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Gaynsford est née en 1457, à Crowhurst, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Gaynsford, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margaret Sidney, avait 36 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Robert White. Elle est décédée environ 1497, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Crowhurst, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Gaynsford 1457 in Crowhurst, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicholas Gaynsford 34 und ihre Mutter Margaret Sidney 36. Sie hatte mit Robert White mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1497 im Alter von 41 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Crowhurst, Surrey, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Gaynsford è nata il nel 1457 nel Crowhurst, Surrey, England, sua padre, Nicholas Gaynsford, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Margaret Sidney, aveva 36 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Robert White. Morì circa 1497, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Crowhurst, Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Gaynsfordが1457年にイギリススリークロウウルストで生まれた時，父Nicholas Gaynsfordは34歳，母Margaret Sidneyは36歳であった。彼女はRobert Whiteとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1497年に故郷で41歳で死去し，イギリススリークロウウルストにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Gaynsford(이)가 1457년 영국 수리 크로화르스트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas Gaynsford(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Sidney(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 Robert White(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1497년 그녀의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수리 크로화르스트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Gaynsford nasceu em 1457, em Crowhurst, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Gaynsford, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Sidney, tinha 36 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Robert White. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1497, em sua cidade natal, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Crowhurst, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Gaynsford родилась в 1457 г. в местности кроухурст, сурри, Англия, её отцу по имени Nicholas Gaynsford было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Sidney, 36. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Robert White. Она умерла около 1497 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности кроухурст, сурри, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Gaynsford nació en 1457, en Crowhurst, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Gaynsford, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Margaret Sidney, tenía 36 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Robert White. Murió aproximadamente 1497, en su pueblo, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Crowhurst, Surrey, Inglaterra.
